# Appium Mobile Automation Boilerplate
A production-ready, cross-platform mobile test automation framework.

## Key Technical Details
- Language: Java 11 / 17+
- Frameworks: Appium (W3C Actions API), TestNG, Maven
- Parallel Execution: ThreadLocal-managed AppiumDriver instances for multi-device execution.
- Design Pattern: Page Object Model (POM) with PageFactory.
- Reporting: Allure Reports with automated screenshots, video attachments, and Logcat captures on failure.
- Utilities: Excel data-driven reading, property-file configuration.
